Article.title: Article
Article.description: Represents a news article for the website, primarily sourced and synchronized from note.com, with additional local metadata and AI-generated summaries for enhanced readability and content management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Article entity.

title.description: The main title of the article, retrieved from note.com during synchronization.

noteUrl.description: The full URL of the original article on note.com, serving as the primary source link.

slug.description: A URL-friendly, unique identifier for the article.

publishDate.description: The date and time the article was originally published.

lastSyncedDate.description: The date and time when the article's content was last synchronized.

htmlContent.description: The full HTML content of the article.

summary.description: A concise, AI-generated summary of the article's content.

mainImageUrl.description: URL of the primary image associated with the article.

isPublished.description: Flag indicating whether the article is visible to public users.

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category this article belongs to.

authorName.description: The name of the author (from RSS or internal).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

name.description: The human-readable name of the category.

definition.description: Stores individual articles. Restricted to specific authorized emails for writes.
